metadata.description: Skapa en central promptmall med 8 startprompter för typiska kommunflöden (klarspråk, medborgarmejl, FAQ, kallelse, beslutsunderlag, checklista, rutiner, tvåversionstexter)

backlog.title: Define quick settings for export modal
backlog.verification: Quick settings are functional and visible in the modal.
backlog.notes: Include options for default export configurations.

backlog.title: Design dropdowns for role and audience
backlog.notes: Ensure dropdowns are accessible and intuitive.

backlog.title: Implement tone, length, and format options
backlog.verification: Options are selectable and affect export output.
backlog.notes: Provide clear labels and tooltips for each option.

backlog.title: Test and validate export modal functionality
backlog.verification: All features work as expected without errors.
backlog.notes: Conduct user testing and fix any issues found.

backlog.title: Move export settings to modal
backlog.verification: Export settings appear in a modal when advanced mode is enabled, and settings are saved locally if 'Remember my choices' is checked.
backlog.notes: Ensure the modal is accessible and integrates seamlessly with the existing export flow.

backlog.title: Add preview feature to export modal
backlog.verification: Users can preview the exact text to be exported before copying, and the preview updates dynamically.
backlog.notes: Include a 'Preview' button and ensure the preview matches the final exported text.

history.summary: Plan created with 5 steps for export modal functionality.
Implemented batch steps 1–3: Quick settings, dropdowns, and tone/length/format options.
Fixed settings menu visibility: Removed 'display: none' from .settings-dropdown base CSS so toggle works correctly.
Fixed settings menu positioning: Moved to top-right corner using absolute positioning relative to main container.
Repositioned settings menu outside main container using fixed positioning to prevent overlap with prompt cards.
Wrapped settings menu in container div with normal flow positioning to prevent mobile overlap issues.
Fixed settings dropdown responsive behavior: changed mobile media query to keep right alignment and prevent viewport overflow.
Verified settings menu bugfixes: visibility, positioning, mobile responsiveness, and dropdown alignment all working. No regressions detected. Risk: LOW.
GO for merge: Settings menu bugfixes approved. Clean CSS-only changes, QA verified, low risk, no regressions. Follow-up: monitor mobile edge cases.
Updated documentation: Added settings menu section to README with usage instructions, technical architecture notes, and inline HTML comments explaining design decisions.

rules.flow: analyst → architect → planner → engineer → qa → reviewer → writer
